message:
feat: add remote target to 'gt hook attach' (gt-e2ewg)

Add optional [target] positional arg to 'gt hook attach' and top-level
'gt hook <bead>' commands, matching the pattern already used by
'gt hook detach <bead> [target]'. This allows Mayor and other agents to
hook work to remote agents directly without needing to nudge them.

Examples:
  gt hook attach gt-abc gastown/crew/max   # Hook bead to max
  gt hook gt-abc gastown/crew/max          # Same via top-level

When a target is provided, the command resolves the target agent's
identity and beads directory, then sets the bead status to hooked with
the target as assignee and updates the target's agent bead hook_bead field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
